dialog_history.content: Hello, how can I help you?
I have been experiencing dysuria, urinary frequency, and urgency for the past two days. I also have suprapubic tenderness and a low-grade fever of 38.1°C.
My urine appears cloudy, and I have a mild backache. My current pain level is a 4 out of 10.
I have no flank pain, nausea, or vomiting. There is no vaginal discharge, bleeding, or hematuria.
[DDX] (cystitis; urethritis; interstitial cystitis; pyelonephritis; pelvic inflammatory disease)
